message:
test(demo_showcase): Update tests and snapshots

E2E tests:
- docs_e2e.rs, logs_e2e.rs, mouse_e2e.rs: Streamlined test patterns
- println_gating_tests.rs: Improved output gating tests
- pty_harness.rs: Refined PTY harness utilities
- rwlock_safety_tests.rs: Updated RwLock panic safety tests

Snapshot tests:
- snapshot_tests.rs: Enhanced snapshot testing logic
- Updated snapshots for jobs and settings pages (120x40, 80x24)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
